sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92934" key="r(w=|on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥῷον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>,= <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Τρώων οἶνος</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">148</biblScope> </bibl> (who derives it from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥώω</foreign>). <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥώπαες</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, sine expl., ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">131</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
